headline: Unpacking Q4 Earnings: Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) In The Context Of Other Transportation and Logistics Stocks
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) and the rest of the transportation and logistics stocks fared in Q4.
